repos.name: portfolioSite
repos.description: This repo is for my portfoio site. It's a showcase of my software engineering projects, technical experiments, and coding journey. It's basically a resume with better syntax highlighting.

repos.name: AiTutoring
repos.description: A high-performance monorepo featuring a Next.js frontend and Serverless backend. Integrated with Stripe for secure payments and Calendly for seamless scheduling. Built for speed, scalability, and easy deployment via Vercel.

repos.name: spotifyHero
repos.description: Desktop app that turns your Spotify tracks into a Friday Night Funkin' / Guitar Hero-style experience. Auto-generated notes play alongside your screen, jump in anytime via keybind. Includes scoring, leaderboards, and easy sharing to challenge friends on any song.

repos.name: cmuMarchMadness-ML
repos.description: An ML model created to approximate the winners of CMU’s March Madness basketball tournaments.

repos.name: smartHome
repos.description: A fully integrated model building and web-based dashboard where a user can authenticate, toggle a light or door lock remotely, view real-time temperature and occupancy data. This project demonstrates a “web-first” reasoning, proving that the model home’s essential functions are entirely managed by the rules engine and secure handshake protocol.
